post.summary: Set group announce mode (only admins can send messages)
Set group locked mode (only admins can edit group info)

post.description: Connect to instance with the provided data

get.description: Returns jid, number, profileName and profilePicUrl of the connected instance
get.summary: Get instance profile with photo, name and number

post.description: React to a message with support for fromMe field and participant field for group messages

parameters.description: React to a message with fromMe and participant fields
parameters.name: message

post.description: Send a button message with interactive buttons (reply, URL, phone, copy code, PIX)
Send a carousel message with multiple cards (product catalog style)
Send a list message with multiple sections and rows
Get user profile (name and avatar) for a phone number

destinationJID.description: The destination user. This should match the MessageInfo.Recipient field.

addressingMode.description: The addressing mode of the message (phone number or LID)

broadcastListOwner.description:
When sending a read receipt to a broadcast list message, the Chat is the broadcast list
and Sender is you, so this field contains the recipient of the read receipt.

chat.description: The chat where the message was sent.

deviceSentMeta.description: Metadata for direct messages sent from another one of the user's own devices.

isFromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by the current user instead of someone else.

isGroup.description: Whether the chat is a group chat or broadcast list.

recipientAlt.description: The alternative address of the recipient of the message for DMs.

sender.description: The user who sent the message.

senderAlt.description: The alternative address of the user who sent the message

airichResponseContentItem.description:
